description: A horizontal graphic on a dark blue background with a faint embossed Department of Homeland Security seal on the right. A DHS seal and the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services appear at the top left. Large white text reads NEWS RELEASE, with a serif headline below it reading Homeland Security Terminates Somalia's Temporary Protected Status Designation.
notable_text: U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; NEWS RELEASE; Homeland Security Terminates Somalia's Temporary Protected Status Designation
